radar.title: 把每個訊號轉成製作問題
radar.detail: 它是否適合現有頻道、擁有可安全使用的素材，以及是否給觀眾一個具體的停留理由？

radar.title: 旅遊素材：第一次參與的攻略
radar.detail: 不做全天流水帳；改用具體問題：要先知道甚麼、怎樣參與、哪些可以跳過。

radar.title: 投資頻道：先建立可重複驗證的形式
radar.detail: 在增加頻道數之前，先以穩定主持的解說片測試留存。

briefs.title: Daily Asset Brief: Japan Field Notes — Winter Night
briefs.summary: This brief outlines the audio asset generation plan for July 20, 2026, focusing on the 'Japan Field Notes — Winter Night' package. Assets are balanced between ambient travel fusions for the Field Notes system and evocative dramatic cues to expand our AI character drama bank, supporting our ongoing investment channel validation.
prompts: Duration: 2:15. BPM: 65. Instruments: Traditional shakuhachi flute, sparse acoustic koto, gentle wind chimes, and ambient winter wind foley. Arrangement: Minimalist and spacious ambient landscape, slowly building with warm sub-bass pads. No vocals. Clean fade-out ending at 2:10.

Duration: 3:00. BPM: 82. Instruments: Warm Rhodes electric piano, vinyl crackle, subtle snow-crunch foley, and a laid-back boom-bap drum loop. Arrangement: Lo-fi hip-hop track capturing a late-night Tokyo alleyway in the snow. No vocals. Seamless loop point at 2:56.

Duration: 1:45. BPM: 60. Instruments: Melancholic solo grand piano, cello ensemble, and faint distant train station announcements under wet reverb. Arrangement: Minimalist, neoclassical dramatic cue for reflective AI character dialogue. No vocals. Clean decay ending.

Duration: 2:00. BPM: 55. Instruments: Bittersweet female hummed vocal (no lyrics, melodic sighing), intimate nylon-string acoustic guitar, and soft analog synthesizer drone. Arrangement: Intimate, close-mic performance for AI character drama emotional climax. Features clear, non-lexical vocal hums. Clean ending.

Duration: 2:30. BPM: 110. Instruments: Rhythmic shamisen, modern digital synth plucks, and a driving mid-tempo shiko drum beat. Arrangement: Upbeat electronic-traditional fusion representing a neon-lit winter street in Osaka. No vocals. Seamless loop point at 2:24.

Duration: 1:50. BPM: 75. Instruments: Deep, resonant low taiko drum strikes, tension-building pizzicato strings, and cold metallic sound design drones. Arrangement: Cinematic suspense cue designed for high-stakes AI character confrontation in a winter setting. No vocals. Sharp, sudden stop ending.

briefs.title: Daily Music Asset Brief - 2026-07-21

meta.licensing: No licensing rights claimed. Internal R&D and platform testing purposes only.

briefs.summary: This brief structures today's music asset collection around the 'Food Close-up / Café' visual package, generating warm, sensory, and acoustic textures. To optimize platform workflows, we are actively validating tracks for our primary investment channel, supplying organic, acoustic-electronic hybrids for the travel 'Field Notes' system, and banking vocal-inclusive dramatic stems specifically designated for the AI character drama archive.
prompts: Duration: 60 seconds. BPM: 82. Instruments: Soft felt piano, muted acoustic guitar, warm upright bass, subtle vinyl crackle. Arrangement: Gentle, repetitive melodic loops optimized for close-up food preparation videos. Starts with solo piano, introducing a cozy, rhythmic café groove at 0:15. No vocals. Ends with a clean, fading piano chord.

Duration: 45 seconds. BPM: 112. Instruments: Acoustic ukulele, brushed snare, glockenspiel, shaker, bouncy acoustic bass. Arrangement: Bright, cheerful, and light-hearted. Fast-paced fingerpicking intro leading to a full, breezy café patio theme that maintains high energy. No vocals. Ends on a clean, decisive acoustic strum.

Duration: 90 seconds. BPM: 120. Instruments: Minimalist analog synthesizers, muted plucks, steady deep sub-bass, clean electronic hi-hats. Arrangement: Sleek, analytical, and professional electronic track designed as an investment channel backdrop. Gradual, mathematical build with rising synth pulses and a highly structured midsection. No vocals. Loop point at 1:20.

Duration: 75 seconds. BPM: 95. Instruments: Charango, ambient field recordings of wind and distant footsteps, nylon-string guitar, soft synth pads. Arrangement: Organic, travel-inspired hybrid theme for the Field Notes system. Intro starts with field textures, transitioning into a warm acoustic progression, building to a reflective, open-air climax. No vocals. Clean fade ending.

Duration: 120 seconds. BPM: 70. Instruments: Solo melancholic grand piano, cinematic cello, atmospheric reverb. Vocals: Clear, wordless, haunting female soprano vocalizations (specifically labeled for AI character drama). Arrangement: Sparse, emotionally heavy, starting with solo piano, introducing the vocal layer at 0:30, and swelling with a tragic cello line at 1:10. Ends on a long, decaying piano sustain.

Duration: 90 seconds. BPM: 80. Instruments: Dark cinematic analog drones, tense staccato violins, distorted bass pulses. Vocals: Low, rhythmic whispering and heavy, rhythmic breathing (specifically labeled for AI character drama suspense). Arrangement: Tense, suspenseful atmosphere building from quiet isolation to a sudden, dramatic peak. Ends on a sudden, sharp cut off.

briefs.title: Travel Guide Utility & Field Notes Asset Package
briefs.focus: A versatile utility music package optimized for travel field notes, geography-based narratives, and AI character drama, styled with analytical and sophisticated tones to support an adjacent investment-oriented channel strategy.
briefs.meta: All 10 prompts in this asset package are Gemini R&D conceptual prototypes. No music generation has occurred, and no licensing rights are implied or claimed.
briefs.summary: This asset package provides 10 music prompts designed to accompany spoken travel guides and high-concept narrative content. It balances organic acoustic instrumentation with analytical synthesis, providing clear frequency space for narrator voiceovers, map transitions, and subtle emotional cues.
prompts: Duration: 2:45. BPM: 110. Mood: Optimistic, analytical, and warm. Instrument Constraints: Steel-string acoustic guitar, light synthesized marimba, warm analog pad, and soft shaker. Arrangement: Starts with a solo acoustic guitar pattern, introducing a subtle marimba and synth pad at the first edit point. It builds with a light, steady shaker rhythm through the midsection, resolving to a clean acoustic finish. Edit Points: Natural transitions near 15s (pad swell), 30s (marimba entry), 60s (shaker pattern change), and 90s (tonal shift). Loopable Middle: The section between 1:00 and 2:00 is designed to loop seamlessly. Space for Voiceover: Scooped mid-frequencies leave ample room for narration and ambient location sound recordings.

Duration: 2:50. BPM: 95. Mood: Curious, organic, and exploratory. Instrument Constraints: Nylon-string acoustic guitar, warm upright bass, atmospheric synthetic wind textures, and a soft Fender Rhodes piano. Arrangement: Features delicate fingerpicked guitar and slow, grounding bass notes that slowly build with reflective Rhodes chords in the second minute before a natural fade out. Edit Points: Seamless edit boundaries near 15s (bass pulse entry), 30s (Rhodes chord entry), 60s (subtle harmonic shift), and 90s (bridge breakdown). Loopable Middle: The segment from 0:45 to 2:15 can be looped. Space for Voiceover: The low-mid frequency range is kept quiet and clean to preserve speech clarity.

Duration: 3:00. BPM: 120. Mood: Kinetic, modern, and sophisticated. Instrument Constraints: Plucked synthesizer arpeggios, clean electric bass guitar, muted electric guitar staccatos, and subtle organic rimshots. Arrangement: Starts with a rhythmic synth pattern, developing with steady bass pulses and tight electric guitar accents, reaching a dynamic yet controlled peak at 1:45 before a clean, unresolved ending. Edit Points: Editing points positioned at 15s (percussion drop), 30s (guitar pattern entry), 60s (harmonic drop), and 90s (re-entry of main arpeggio). Loopable Middle: The section between 1:00 and 2:20 is fully loopable. Space for Voiceover: High-frequency transient control ensures narrator clarity over busy transit sound effects.

Duration: 2:35. BPM: 105. Mood: Professional, calculated, and steady. Instrument Constraints: Felt acoustic piano, ticking percussive textures, sub-bass pulse, and evolving atmospheric pads. Arrangement: A driving felt piano pattern is layered over a persistent clock-like ticking, with slow-moving sub-bass notes providing a foundation that gently yields to a sustained, clean piano ring-out. Edit Points: Clean edit markers near 15s (ticking starts), 30s (sub-bass enters), 60s (piano octave shift), and 90s (calm section). Loopable Middle: Loopable from 0:30 to 1:45. Space for Voiceover: Arranged specifically to sit beneath complex statistical data reads or geographical info delivery.

Duration: 2:55. BPM: 80. Mood: Introspective, melancholic, and ethereal. Instrument Constraints: Low drone synthesizer, expressive acoustic cello, glockenspiel, and a processed synthetic vocal hum (non-lyrical, clearly labeled as a synthetic AI character drama element). Arrangement: Begins with a low drone, introducing the cello at the first marker, leading into a sparse, reflective synthetic hum that evokes digital consciousness before resolving on a quiet glockenspiel note. Edit Points: Edit points located at 15s (cello entry), 30s (synthetic hum introduction), 60s (tonal shift), and 90s (minimalist drop). Loopable Middle: Loopable between 1:00 and 2:15. Space for Voiceover: Highly spacious frequency spectrum designed to support dramatic character dialogue.

Duration: 2:40. BPM: 115. Mood: Warm, collaborative, and globally conscious. Instrument Constraints: Synthetic hand percussion (congas and tablas hybrid), acoustic kalimba, nylon-string guitar, and clean glass-like pads. Arrangement: Starts with a sparse kalimba pattern, adding organic-sounding hand percussion and acoustic guitar strumming in the midsection, and concluding on a gentle, clean acoustic decay. Edit Points: Clean transitions at 15s (percussion entry), 30s (pad swell), 60s (rhythm consolidation), and 90s (kalimba solo). Loopable Middle: The segment from 0:45 to 1:55 is loopable. Space for Voiceover: Carefully mixed to allow external field recordings of city noise or nature to sit comfortably alongside speech.

Duration: 1:45. BPM: 110. Mood: Minimal, reflective, and raw. Instrument Constraints: Solo steel-string acoustic guitar with realistic room resonance. Arrangement: An alternate, entirely acoustic and percussion-free rendition of Prompt 1, focusing on clean picking and natural string movement. Edit Points: Clear natural boundaries at 15s, 30s, and 60s, with a gentle, ringing chord ending. Space for Voiceover: Complete transparency for detailed narration or dense travel field notes.

Duration: 1:30. BPM: 120. Mood: Late-night, subdued, and ambient. Instrument Constraints: Muted lo-fi electric guitar, vinyl crackle effect, and a deep sub-bass. Arrangement: A drumless, atmospheric alternate arrangement of Prompt 3, focusing on warm, jazzy electric guitar chords drifting over a steady vinyl crackle. Edit Points: Edit points at 15s, 30s, and 60s, terminating in a quiet fade into vinyl noise. Space for Voiceover: Subdued high frequencies ensure a cozy, intimate frame for spoken-word travel summaries.

Duration: 0:35. BPM: 115. Mood: Dynamic, transitional, and direct. Instrument Constraints: Bright acoustic chime, quick steel-string guitar flourish, upward analog synth sweep, and a warm kick drum hit. Arrangement: A functional cue designed for map transitions or information cards, starting with a rapid synth sweep and chime, peaking at 0:15, and quickly decaying into a lingering high-frequency tail. Edit Points: Distinct peak transition point at 15s. Space for Voiceover: Allows for a quick, clear title-card voiceover during the brief musical transition.

Duration: 2:50. BPM: 100. Mood: Futuristic, mathematical, and contemplative. Instrument Constraints: Granular-synthesized acoustic guitar textures, microtonal digital blips, deep sub-bass, and a processed room-tone hum. Arrangement: Starts with organic acoustic guitar notes that slowly dissolve into granular clouds; a steady, clockwork-like synth pulse enters mid-track, ending abruptly on a clean, sharp microtonal chime. Edit Points: Edits near 15s (glitch texture start), 30s (sub-bass entry), 60s (pulse patterns merge), and 90s (experimental breakdown). Loopable Middle: Not loopable due to progressive mathematical development. Space for Voiceover: Designed as an evocative backing track for tech-forward travel guides or complex AI-driven character segments.
